embeddings.text:
Q1.1 — What is WiZiAi?

Answer: WiZiAi is a one-stop test-preparation platform designed mainly for NEET & JEE aspirants across India. It offers AI-powered features such as assessing your preparation level, analysing your performance on mock/tests, identifying your strengths & weaknesses, generating personalised study plans, virtual mentoring, score-prediction, counselling and more.

metadata.question: What is WiZiAi?

embeddings.text:
Q1.2 — How do I create an account on WiZiAi?

Answer: You can sign up by visiting the platform (web or app) and choosing “Sign Up”. Provide your email/mobile, set a password, and fill in basic details such as your name, target exam (NEET or JEE), year of attempt, current standard (eg. Class 11 or 12), and optional details such as exam board, previous scores if any. After verification (via email/OTP), your account becomes active.

metadata.question: How do I create an account on WiZiAi?

embeddings.text:
Q1.3 — Is WiZiAi free or paid?

Answer: We offer a free trial/basic tier (with limited tests, basic analytics) and one or more premium subscription plans (for full access: unlimited mock tests, deep analytics, personalised mentoring, counselling, score-prediction etc). You can upgrade anytime in your profile.

metadata.question: Is WiZiAi free or paid?

embeddings.text:
Q1.4 — What devices or platforms are supported?

Answer: WiZiAi is accessible via browser (desktop/laptop) and via a mobile app (Android & iOS) for on-the-go access. It works best with a stable internet connection. Ensure your browser/app is updated.

metadata.question: What devices or platforms are supported?

embeddings.text:
Q1.5 — I forgot my password. What should I do?

Answer: Click “Forgot Password” on the login screen, enter the registered email/mobile, you’ll receive a reset link or OTP. Follow the instructions to set a new password. If you face any issues, contact support.

metadata.question: I forgot my password. What should I do?

embeddings.text:
Q2.1 — What kinds of tests are available on WiZiAi?

Answer: The platform includes full-length mock tests replicating NEET/JEE style & syllabus, sectional tests (eg. Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Maths), topic-wise quizzes, speed-practice drills, and past-year question banks. The AI engine adjusts difficulty based on your performance.

metadata.question: What kinds of tests are available on WiZiAi?

embeddings.text:
Q2.2 — How is the test difficulty determined?

Answer: Initially you’ll take a diagnostic test to gauge your baseline. Based on your performance (accuracy, speed, topics weak/strong), WiZiAi’s AI will adjust future tests’ difficulty and mix to challenge you appropriately and to optimise learning.

metadata.question: How is the test difficulty determined?

embeddings.text:
Q2.3 — What happens after I finish a test?

Answer: Immediately after submission, you’ll get a detailed report: your score, section-wise breakdown, time per question, accuracy/attempt pattern. Then the system suggests your weak topics, flags areas for improvement, and shows trend graphs comparing your current performance with previous tests, peers (optional) and target benchmarks.

metadata.question: What happens after I finish a test?

embeddings.text:
Q2.4 — Can I retake a test? Is there a limit?

Answer: Yes — you can retake most tests. For full-length mocks, there may be restrictions on frequency (eg. once a week) depending on your subscription plan. For topic or sectional quizzes, you can retake more often to improve.

metadata.question: Can I retake a test? Is there a limit?

embeddings.text:
Q2.5 — How does WiZiAi track improvement over time?

Answer: WiZiAi maintains your “performance history” — each test you take is logged with timestamp, score, topic-wise metrics. You can view trend-charts (eg. accuracy vs time, average time per question, weak-topic count). The AI uses these trends to generate predictive insights such as “If you continue like this, your likely exam score will be ___”.

metadata.question: How does WiZiAi track improvement over time?

embeddings.text:
Q3.1 — How is the study plan generated?

Answer: After your diagnostic test and initial performance data, WiZiAi’s AI engine crafts a personalised study plan: it factors in your target exam (NEET/JEE), your current level, your exam date, number of days/hours you can study, and your weak/strong topics. The plan specifies what to study each day/week, time to allocate, when to revision, when to take mocks.

metadata.question: How is the study plan generated?

embeddings.text:
Q3.2 — Can I customise the study plan?

Answer: Yes — you can adjust parameters: available daily study hours, days you cannot study (for holidays), topics you wish to focus more on, and preferred test-days. The AI will adapt the plan accordingly. You may also pause or reschedule plan tasks.

metadata.question: Can I customise the study plan?

embeddings.text:
Q3.3 — How often is the study plan updated?

Answer: The plan is dynamic. After each major test or weekly review, the AI re-evaluates your performance, identifies new weak areas, and updates the plan to reflect current needs (for example, if you improve in a topic, less time is allotted next week, and more time is given to emerging weak topics).

metadata.question: How often is the study plan updated?

embeddings.text:
Q3.4 — What if I don’t follow the plan?

Answer: The platform monitors adherence (you mark when you complete tasks). If you fall behind, the AI will notify you (via app/email) and propose remedial items or adjust the plan. Consistent non-adherence may reduce prediction accuracy, so try to stay on track and mark tasks honestly.

metadata.question: What if I don’t follow the plan?

embeddings.text:
Q4.1 — What is the virtual mentoring feature?

Answer: WiZiAi provides a virtual mentor (AI-based) who interacts with you: answering queries (concept doubts, study-tips, exam-strategy), prompting reflections (eg. “You missed many questions on this topic — shall we schedule a revision session?”), and guiding you through your plan. In higher subscription tiers, you may also get human mentor sessions.

metadata.question: What is the virtual mentoring feature?

embeddings.text:
Q4.2 — What kind of counselling is available?

Answer: Counselling includes: exam-strategy sessions (how to approach NEET/JEE, how to manage time during exam, how to pick questions), stress-management & motivation sessions, insight into career options (medical/engineering specialisations) based on your performance and interests, and guidance on board exam + entrance exam synergy.

metadata.question: What kind of counselling is available?

embeddings.text:
Q4.3 — How do I access mentor/counsellor?

Answer: From your dashboard go to “Mentor/Counselling” section, choose session type, pick available slot (for human mentor) or chat with AI mentor instantly. For human mentor, confirm slot and you will get video/voice/text session link. Sessions may be limited per month depending on your plan.

metadata.question: How do I access mentor/counsellor?

embeddings.text:
Q4.4 — Is mentor interaction included in all plans?

Answer: Basic plans may include only AI mentor and limited counselling. Premium plans include more frequent human mentor sessions, priority slots, and more detailed human-counsellor access.

metadata.question: Is mentor interaction included in all plans?

embeddings.text:
Q5.1 — How does WiZiAi predict my future score?

Answer: The AI uses your past test data (scores, speed, accuracy, weak topics, etc.), study-plan adherence, and typical exam-format statistics to generate a likely score range for your target exam. It also provides confidence level (eg. “High chance of scoring 550-580 in NEET if current trend continues”).

metadata.question: How does WiZiAi predict my future score?

embeddings.text:
Q5.2 — Is the score prediction guaranteed?

Answer: No — the prediction is a statistical estimate based on your current performance. Real exam performance can vary due to many factors (paper difficulty, exam day condition, time-management, etc.). Use the prediction as guidance, not as a guarantee.

metadata.question: Is the score prediction guaranteed?

embeddings.text:
Q5.3 — Can I improve prediction accuracy?

Answer: Yes — by taking more mock tests, improving your topic-wise performance (especially weak areas), adhering to the study plan, and consistently reviewing your analytics. The more data you give the AI (through everyday usage), the better it can predict.

metadata.question: Can I improve prediction accuracy?

embeddings.text:
Q5.4 — What analytics dashboards are available?

Answer: You’ll find various dashboards:
•	Overall performance summary (score, percentile, rank estimation)
•	Topic-wise strength/weakness heat-map
•	Time-per-question distribution
•	Attempt vs omit ratio
•	Weekly/monthly trend charts
•	Peer-comparison (optional)
•	Study-plan completion status
•	Prediction of future score & exam readiness index

metadata.question: What analytics dashboards are available?

embeddings.text:
Q6.1 — Will WiZiAi remind me of my plan tasks?

Answer: Yes — you will receive push notifications (mobile app), email reminders or in-app alerts for tasks from your study plan: scheduled study sessions, mock test dates, revision slots, mentor sessions. You can configure how often and when (morning, evening) you want reminders.

metadata.question: Will WiZiAi remind me of my plan tasks?

embeddings.text:
Q6.2 — Can I mark tasks as complete or skip them?

Answer: Yes — in your study-plan interface you can mark tasks as ‘Completed’, ‘Skipped’, or ‘Reschedule’. If you skip or reschedule, the AI will adjust the future schedule accordingly and you’ll get a nudge to catch up.

metadata.question: Can I mark tasks as complete or skip them?

embeddings.text:
Q6.3 — Does WiZiAi track my study-habits?

Answer: Yes — the platform tracks your study hours, consistency (days you studied vs days you missed), how many tasks you completed on time, how many revision cycles you did. These metrics feed into your readiness index and help the AI coach you on improving habits.

metadata.question: Does WiZiAi track my study-habits?

embeddings.text:
Q7.1 — What are the payment options available?

Answer: Payment can be done via major credit/debit cards, UPI, net-banking, and possibly wallets, depending on your region. You can choose monthly, quarterly or yearly subscription plans depending on your need.

metadata.question: What are the payment options available?

embeddings.text:
Q7.2 — Is there a free trial?

Answer: Yes — a free trial (duration maybe 7-14 days) is available for new users to explore basic features (diagnostic test, few mock tests, limited analytics). After trial ends, upgrade to a paid plan to continue full access.

metadata.question: Is there a free trial?

embeddings.text:
Q7.3 — How do I cancel my subscription?

Answer: Go to your account settings → Subscription → Cancel. If you cancel mid-period you may continue access until end of your billing cycle (depending on policy). No refund is typically offered for unused days unless explicitly stated.

metadata.question: How do I cancel my subscription?

embeddings.text:
Q7.4 — Can I change my plan (upgrade/downgrade)?

Answer: Yes — you can upgrade anytime; the system will pro-rate the remaining amount. If you downgrade, the new plan features will apply from next billing cycle.

metadata.question: Can I change my plan (upgrade/downgrade)?

embeddings.text:
Q8.1 — How is my data used?

Answer: Your test scores, time per question, study-plan adherence, device usage and other performance metrics are collected to generate analytics, predictions, personalised study plans and mentor recommendations. The data is used in aggregated and anonymised form for research and improvement of AI models. Personal credentials and sensitive information are securely stored.

metadata.question: How is my data used?

embeddings.text:
Q8.2 — Is my personal information safe?

Answer: Yes — WiZiAi uses encryption for data‐in‐transit and data‐at‐rest, follows standard data protection policies, and ensures your personal profile, results and behaviour are accessible only to you and authorised system components. If you upgrade to human mentor sessions, those interactions follow secure protocols.

metadata.question: Is my personal information safe?

embeddings.text:
Q8.3 — Does WiZiAi share my data with third parties?

Answer: Only with your explicit consent (for example if you choose to participate in peer-comparison or research programmes). Otherwise, your data remains internal and is not sold or shared externally. You can review our Privacy Policy in the app.

metadata.question: Does WiZiAi share my data with third parties?

embeddings.text:
Q8.4 — How does the AI ensure fair predictions and recommendations?

Answer: The AI algorithms are designed to avoid biases (such as giving unfair advantage to one group) by training on large, diverse datasets, and by continuously auditing the models. The mentorship and counselling components provide human oversight when needed.

metadata.question: How does the AI ensure fair predictions and recommendations?

embeddings.text:
Q9.1 — What do I do if I encounter a technical error or bug?

Answer: Use Help/Support section in the app or website to submit a ticket. Provide details (device model, OS version, steps to reproduce the error) and our support team will respond. For urgent issues (e.g., test submission failure), use live chat or helpline (if available) for faster resolution.

metadata.question: What do I do if I encounter a technical error or bug?

embeddings.text:
Q9.2 — Can I use WiZiAi offline?

Answer: Most features require internet connectivity (tests, analytics dashboards, study-plan updates). However, some study-plan tasks (like reading offline material) may be done offline, but results will sync once you reconnect.

metadata.question: Can I use WiZiAi offline?

embeddings.text:
Q9.3 — What browser/devices are supported?

Answer: Recommended browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari (latest versions). On mobile: Android version XX and above, iOS version YY and above. Ensure you allow notifications and storage permissions as needed.

metadata.question: What browser/devices are supported?

embeddings.text:
Q9.4 — What if I need help selecting a plan or switching target exams?

Answer: The counselling/mentor section can help you choose the right plan. If you’ve chosen the wrong target exam (e.g., you selected JEE but meant NEET), go to profile settings and update your exam preference. If it’s beyond a certain stage (after many tests), contact support.

metadata.question: What if I need help selecting a plan or switching target exams?

embeddings.text:
Q10.1 — Can WiZiAi help me if I also have board exams (Class 12) along with NEET/JEE?

Answer: Yes — while the primary focus is NEET/JEE, you can indicate your board syllabus along with your entrance exam target. The AI study plan will try to integrate both (where overlap exists), schedule board revision tasks, and adjust mocks accordingly. You may also select board-only tasks in your plan.

metadata.question: Can WiZiAi help me if I also have board exams (Class 12) along with NEET/JEE?

embeddings.text:
Q10.2 — Can I invite friends or share study groups?

Answer: Yes — WiZiAi may provide a “Study Group” or “Peer-Challenge” feature (depending on plan) where you can invite fellow aspirants, compare progress (optional), challenge each other with topic quizzes, and share insights. You control what you share and what remains private.

metadata.question: Can I invite friends or share study groups?

embeddings.text:
Q10.3 — What happens if my exam date changes or if I drop the year?

Answer: You can update your exam date in profile settings. The study plan and test schedule will automatically adjust (for example longer revision period if your date is pushed). If you decide to drop a year and aim next season, you can reset or extend your plan accordingly.

metadata.question: What happens if my exam date changes or if I drop the year?

embeddings.text:
Q10.4 — Does WiZiAi cover both NEET (UG) and JEE (Main/Advanced)?

Answer: Yes — the platform supports both NEET and JEE aspirants. While the core features remain similar (diagnostic test, analytics, study-plan), the content (such as subject breakdowns, question types) is tuned specifically for each exam. Make sure you select the correct exam in your profile.

metadata.question: Does WiZiAi cover both NEET (UG) and JEE (Main/Advanced)?

embeddings.text:
Q10.5 — How will WiZiAi support me in the last 30/60 days before the exam?

Answer: In the final phase the AI shifts focus: more full-length mocks, timed drills, section-wise speed tests, increased revision frequency of weak topics, more frequent mentor check-ins, stress-management sessions, and final day/mock replicating exam conditions. Based on your recent trends, prediction algorithms adjust to give a final readiness score.

metadata.question: How will WiZiAi support me in the last 30/60 days before the exam?

embeddings.text:
Q11.1 — Are there any prerequisites to use WiZiAi?

Answer: You should have a basic device (computer or smartphone) with internet connectivity. Ability to read and understand English (or other supported languages). A minimum time commitment (you should allocate regular study hours) is helpful for the platform to work effectively.

metadata.question: Are there any prerequisites to use WiZiAi?

embeddings.text:
Q11.2 — What if I skip a long period (e.g., vacations) and resume later?

Answer: The AI will detect the gap (via no activity) and prompt you to perform a fresh diagnostic test to reset baseline. Your study plan will be re-scaled accordingly. If gap is too large, you may lose some of the trend-based prediction accuracy.

metadata.question: What if I skip a long period (e.g., vacations) and resume later?

embeddings.text:
Q11.3 — Are the mock tests accepted by actual exam bodies (NEET, JEE) or official?

Answer: While our mock tests strive to replicate the format, difficulty and timing of the real exam, they are not officially conducted by the exam-bodies. They are for practise and preparation only.

metadata.question: Are the mock tests accepted by actual exam bodies (NEET, JEE) or official?

embeddings.text:
Q11.4 — What are the limitations of the AI features?

Answer: The AI features (prediction, study-plan generation, analytics) depend on your data (tests taken, completion of tasks, device usage). If you don’t engage or provide enough data, the outputs may be less accurate. Also, unpredictable factors (illness, exam conditions, paper difficulty) are outside the system’s control.

metadata.question: What are the limitations of the AI features?

embeddings.text:
Q11.5 — Who can I contact for grievances or feedback?

Answer: Use the “Contact Us” or “Support” section in the app/website. Provide your issue, description and any relevant attachment (screenshots). For feedback (feature requests, content suggestions) you can use the “Feedback” form. The team will revert within the stipulated response time (eg. 24-48 hours).

metadata.question: Who can I contact for grievances or feedback?

embeddings.text:
## Document Overview

**Version**: 1.0  
**Date**: October 21, 2025  
**Purpose**: Comprehensive functional knowledge base for Q&A agent to answer user questions  
**Target Audience**: Q&A AI Agents, User Support Systems  

---

## 1. Platform Overview & Core Purpose

### What is WiziAI?
WiziAI is an AI-powered educational platform designed for competitive exam preparation, specifically targeting JEE (Joint Entrance Examination), NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test), and other competitive exams in India. The platform combines artificial intelligence with proven pedagogical methods to create personalized learning experiences.

### Key Value Propositions
- **98% Success Rate**: Students achieving top ranks in JEE Advanced, JEE Main, and NEET
- **AI-Powered Personalization**: Individual learning patterns, strengths, and improvement areas
- **Comprehensive Analytics**: 30+ detailed performance metrics and insights
- **Intelligent Study Companion**: Adapts to individual needs and accelerates success

### Platform Components
- **Web Application**: Main student interface for quiz taking and performance tracking
- **Mobile App**: Cross-platform React Native application for on-the-go learning
- **Admin Panel**: Administrative dashboard for content and user management
- **AI Services**: OpenAI integration for performance analysis and tutoring

---

## 2. User Authentication & Account Management

### User Registration & Login
**Available Methods:**
- Email and password registration
- Google OAuth integration for quick signup
- JWT-based secure authentication system

**Account Features:**
- Personal profile management
- Password reset functionality
- Multi-device session support
- Secure token-based authentication

**User Roles:**
- **Students**: Main platform users with learning and quiz-taking access
- **Admin Users**: Administrative access with role_id = 1
- **Content Moderators**: Limited admin access for question management

**Profile Management:**
Users can update their:
- Basic information (name, email, phone)
- Subject preferences and target exams
- Study schedules and sleep patterns
- Academic goals and target scores

---

## 3. Subscription Plans & Features

### Available Plans

#### **Free Plan**
- **Custom Quizzes**: Limited quota based on configuration
- **Quiz Solutions**: Access to answer explanations
- **Report Card**: Basic performance reports
- **Performance Analysis**: AI-powered insights
- **Previous Year Questions (PYQs)**: Limited access (varies by config)
- **Diagnostic Test**: Available
- **Study Plan**: 7 days access
- **AI Mentor**: 3000 credits
- **Mock Tests**: 1 test

#### **Basic Plan**
- **Custom Quizzes**: Unlimited
- **Quiz Solutions**: Unlimited
- **Report Card**: Full access
- **Performance Analysis**: Advanced AI insights
- **Previous Year Questions**: 500 questions
- **Diagnostic Test**: Available
- **Study Plan**: 1 month access
- **AI Mentor**: 15000 credits
- **Mock Tests**: 2 tests

#### **Premium Plan**
- **Custom Quizzes**: Unlimited
- **Quiz Solutions**: Unlimited
- **Report Card**: Full access with advanced features
- **Performance Analysis**: Comprehensive AI analytics
- **Previous Year Questions**: 2000 questions
- **Diagnostic Test**: Available
- **Study Plan**: 3 months access
- **AI Mentor**: 50000 credits
- **Mock Tests**: 10 tests

#### **Pro Plan**
- **Custom Quizzes**: Unlimited
- **Quiz Solutions**: Unlimited
- **Report Card**: Full premium access
- **Performance Analysis**: Most advanced AI insights
- **Previous Year Questions**: Unlimited
- **Diagnostic Test**: Available
- **Study Plan**: Unlimited access
- **AI Mentor**: Unlimited credits
- **Mock Tests**: Unlimited

### Billing & Payment
- **Academic Session Billing**: Aligned with educational calendar
- **Payment Gateway**: Integrated payment processing
- **Plan Upgrades**: Seamless tier transitions
- **Feature Enforcement**: Automatic quota and access control

---

## 4. Dashboard & User Interface

### Main Dashboard Features
**Welcome Section:**
- Personalized greeting with user name
- Quick overview of current subscription status
- Points motivation banner

**Quick Stats Cards:**
- Tests completed count
- Overall progress percentage
- Study time tracking (hours)
- Current leaderboard rank

**Quick Actions:**
- Start new quiz
- Resume incomplete quiz
- Generate custom quiz
- Access study plan
- View performance reports

**Point System Overview:**
- Current point balance
- Weekly point progress
- Transaction history
- AI tutor credit status

**Recent Activity:**
- Unattempted quizzes section
- Quiz history with results
- Performance trend indicators

### Navigation Structure
**Public Pages:**
- Home page with platform overview
- About page with company information
- Contact page for support
- Pricing page with subscription plans
- Login and registration pages

**Protected Areas (Requires Login):**
- Dashboard (main hub)
- Profile management
- Quiz interfaces
- Performance analytics
- Study planning tools
- AI tutor interface
- Payment processing

---

## 5. Quiz System & Question Management

### Quiz Types Available

#### **Mock Tests**
- Full-length practice exams
- Exam-like time constraints
- Comprehensive subject coverage
- Detailed performance analysis

#### **Custom Quiz Generator**
- AI-powered question selection
- Subject and topic filtering
- Difficulty level customization

### Quiz Taking Experience

- Review marked questions

#### **Time Management**

### Question Organization

- **Subjects**: Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Biology

**Difficulty Levels:**

- Medium (application-based)
- Hard (advanced problem-solving)
- Expert (competition-level)

**Question Features:**

- Detailed solution explanations

---

## 6. AI-Powered Performance Analysis

### Automatic Analysis Generation
**Trigger Mechanism:**
- Automatically initiated upon quiz completion
- Ensures comprehensive data collection
- Prevents duplicate analysis creation
- Real-time processing with AI integration

**AI Analysis Components:**

#### **Performance Breakdown**
- Overall accuracy percentage
- Subject-wise performance scores
- Topic-level strength identification
- Chapter-wise progress tracking
- Difficulty-based performance analysis

#### **Time Management Assessment**
- Average time per question
- Speed vs accuracy balance
- Time efficiency scoring
- Optimal timing recommendations

#### **Strength & Weakness Analysis**
- Strongest subjects and topics identification
- Areas requiring immediate attention
- Performance consistency evaluation
- Improvement priority ranking

#### **Personalized Recommendations**
- Study plan suggestions
- Topic-specific focus areas
- Practice schedule recommendations
- Motivational insights and encouragement

#### **Progress Tracking**
- Historical performance comparison
- Trend analysis across attempts
- Improvement trajectory visualization
- Goal achievement progress

### Performance Metrics Explained
**Key Performance Indicators:**
- **Accuracy Score**: Percentage of correct answers
- **Time Management Score**: Efficiency in time utilization
- **Difficulty Readiness**: Preparedness for higher difficulty levels
- **Performance Grade**: Overall assessment (A+, A, B+, B, C, etc.)
- **Efficiency Score**: Speed and accuracy combination
- **Mastery Level**: Subject understanding depth (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)

**Visual Analytics:**
- Performance trend charts
- Subject-wise comparison graphs
- Progress tracking visualizations
- Goal achievement indicators

---

## 7. Study Plan & Personalized Learning

### Study Plan Wizard
**Step-by-Step Configuration:**

#### **Step 1: Exam Type Selection**
- Choose target exam (JEE Main, JEE Advanced, NEET)
- Set exam preparation timeline
- Define primary focus areas

#### **Step 2: Current Level Assessment**
- Evaluate current preparation stage
- Input previous exam scores
- Assess subject-wise readiness

#### **Step 3: Goal Setting**
- Define target scores
- Set subject-wise objectives
- Establish timeline milestones

#### **Step 4: Subject Strength Evaluation**
- Rate confidence in each subject
- Identify preferred subjects
- Mark challenging areas

#### **Step 5: Study Pattern Preferences**
- Set daily study hours
- Choose optimal study times
- Define break preferences

#### **Step 6: Commitments & Schedule**
- Add coaching class timings
- Include extracurricular activities
- Set sleep schedule preferences

### Generated Study Plan Features
**Weekly Calendar View:**
- Day-wise study schedule
- Subject rotation planning
- Break time optimization
- Review session scheduling

**Daily Task Management:**
- Topic-specific study tasks
- Practice quiz recommendations
- Revision schedule
- Progress tracking

**Adaptive Scheduling:**
- Performance-based adjustments
- Weakness-focused planning
- Goal-oriented task prioritization
- Time optimization

---

## 8. AI Tutor & Interactive Learning

### AI Tutor Interface
**Credit-Based System:**
- Point deduction per minute of usage
- 50 points per minute standard rate
- Session time tracking
- Balance checking before sessions

**Tutoring Features:**
- Subject-specific doubt resolution
- Concept explanation with examples
- Problem-solving guidance
- Study strategy recommendations

**Session Management:**
- Start and end session tracking
- Real-time timer display

- Session history maintenance

**Integration with Learning:**
- Context-aware responses based on quiz performance
- Personalized explanations
- Weakness-focused tutoring
- Progress-based recommendations

---

## 9. Point System & Gamification

### Point Earning Mechanisms
**Quiz Completion Rewards:**
- Base points for quiz completion
- Accuracy-based bonus points
- Speed bonus for efficient completion

### Leaderboard System

## 10. Report Card & Analytics

### Comprehensive Performance Reports
**Overview Section:**
- Overall performance grade
- Accuracy trend analysis
- Time efficiency assessment
- Progress trajectory

**Subject-Wise Analysis:**
- Individual subject scores
- Comparative performance
- Strength and weakness identification
- Improvement recommendations

**Historical Performance:**
- Quiz attempt history
- Performance trend visualization
- Goal achievement tracking
- Improvement pattern analysis

**AI-Generated Insights:**

- Motivational messages

### Detailed Quiz Results
**Question-Level Analysis:**
- Correct/incorrect answer breakdown
- Time spent per question
- Difficulty level performance
- Subject-wise distribution

**Performance Visualization:**

- Trend line representations

---

## 11. Question Management & Content

### Question Database
**Content Organization:**
- 10,000+ questions across subjects
- Previous year question papers
- Subject expert-curated content

## 15. User Support & Help - Common User Questions & Answers (Part 1)

#### **Account & Registration**
**Q: How do I create a new account?**
A: You can register using your email and password or sign up instantly with Google OAuth. Visit the signup page and follow the registration process.

**Q: I forgot my password. How can I reset it?**
A: Use the "Forgot Password" link on the login page. Enter your email address, and you'll receive a password reset link.

**Q: Can I use the same account on multiple devices?**
A: Yes, your account supports multi-device access. You can log in from your phone, tablet, and computer simultaneously.

#### **Subscription & Plans**
**Q: What's the difference between subscription plans?**
A: Plans differ in quiz quotas, AI tutor credits, study plan access duration, and previous year question limits. Free plan offers basic features, while Pro plan provides unlimited access.

**Q: How does the academic session billing work?**
A: Subscriptions are aligned with the academic calendar, typically running from the start of the academic year for optimal exam preparation timing.

**Q: Can I upgrade my plan mid-session?**
A: Yes, you can upgrade your plan at any time. The system will adjust your features and billing accordingly.

#### **Quiz & Performance**
**Q: How does the AI performance analysis work?**
A: After completing a quiz, our AI analyzes your answers, timing, and patterns to generate personalized insights, identify strengths/weaknesses, and provide study recommendations.

**Q: Why can't I see correct answers immediately?**
A: For security and learning effectiveness, correct answers are revealed only after quiz completion through the detailed results and performance analysis.

**Q: How are my quiz scores calculated?**
A: Scores are based on correct answers, with considerations for difficulty level, time management, and overall performance patterns.

#### **Study Plan & AI Tutor**
**Q: How personalized is the study plan?**
A: The study plan is highly personalized, considering your target exam, current level, subject strengths, study preferences, sleep schedule, and other commitments.

**Q: How does the AI tutor credit system work?**
A: AI tutor sessions cost points from your balance (typically 50 points per minute). Different subscription plans include different credit amounts.

**Q: Can I modify my study plan after creation?**
A: Yes, you can update your preferences and regenerate your study plan to reflect changes in your preparation strategy.

#### **Points & Gamification**
**Q: How do I earn points?**
A: Points are earned through quiz completion, achieving high accuracy, maintaining study streaks, daily logins, and reaching performance milestones.

**Q: What can I do with my points?**
A: Points can be used for AI tutor sessions, unlocking premium features, and accessing advanced analytics.

**Q: How does the leaderboard work?**
A: The leaderboard ranks users based on points earned, with weekly, monthly, and overall rankings to encourage healthy competition.

#### **Technical Issues**
**Q: The website/app is loading slowly. What should I do?**
A: Check your internet connection, try refreshing the page, or clear your browser cache. If issues persist, contact support.

**Q: My quiz progress was lost. Can it be recovered?**
A: The system automatically saves progress. If you experience data loss, contact support with your quiz reference number for assistance.

**Q: I found an incorrect question. How do I report it?**
A: Use the "Flag Question" feature during the quiz or contact support with the question details. Our content team will review and correct it promptly.
